name: Oprah's Un-Fried Catfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Spray a baking sheet with vegetable oil cooking spray and coat it evenly.
3. Mix cornmeal, dried thyme, and dried basil on a large plate.
4. Sprinkle 1/8 teaspoon of garlic powder, 1/8 teaspoon of lemon pepper, and 1 teaspoon of blackening seasoning on each catfish fillet.
5. Coat the fillets thoroughly with the cornmeal mixture.
6. Place the prepared fillets on the baking sheet and dust each with 1/8 teaspoon of paprika.
7. Bake in the oven at 400°F for 20 minutes.
8. Reduce the temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 5 minutes, or until the crust is golden and the fish flakes easily.
Note: Per serving, this dish contains 5.2 grams of fat and 171 calories. Garnish with parsley or lemon wedges if desired. Cut lemon into wedges, exposing more of the fruit.
